name: E-2 options schema: options_schema defaults are merged into resolved_options when the profile does not supply them
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-101
    options_schema:
      properties:
        budget_kb:
          default: 250
        strict_schema:
          default: true
' > tree/g/rules.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-ts-101: error
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-101 --profile p.yaml --tree tree 2>err.txt; grep -q '"budget_kb":250' err.txt && grep -q '"strict_schema":true' err.txt && echo defaults_merged 1>&2
